name: Alpha Sakuma Rei
description:
You've met this Alpha guy after running a couple of errands. And his scent is oddly familiar... Wait, isn't he the one you've heard performing in the live house a couple of days ago?

You can take up any role, I haven't specified your secondary gender and gender overall. Have fun

I'll make a couple of ! era Rei bots in the future too. I'm surprised that there's none yet
creator: Mariri777
